The '''Battle of [[Vnas]]''' was a battle in the early [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] which was waged at the planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].<ref name="FF" /><ref name="DB" /> Having tried to free the planet from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was defeated.<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> Even so, the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] would still make a substantial contribution,<ref name="TEGtVaV" /><ref name="TEGtPaM" /><ref name="FF" /><ref name="DB" /> making victory hard-earned for the Empire. Duro would be liberated from the Empire only years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />
